message:
fix(engine): mark for-in/for-of gaps as Resolved in both inventories

Now that for-in and for-of have real IR1 lowering implementations,
updates both gap inventory systems to reflect the new status:

lowering_gap_inventory.rs:
- Adds LoweringGapStatus::Resolved variant
- ForInStatementPlaceholder and ForOfStatementPlaceholder status
  changes from FailClosed to Resolved
- emitted_ir_shape updated from "no_ir.fail_closed_diagnostic" to
  "ir1.for_in_init_next_loop" / "ir1.for_of_init_next_close_loop"
- semantic_impact updated to describe resolved behavior
- execution_scope_impact updated similarly
- diagnostic_code updated from "fails_closed" to "produces_ir1_ops"
- Tests: fail_closed_site_count drops from 4 to 2

parser_gap_inventory.rs:
- Adds ParserGapRemediationStatus::Resolved variant
- ForInStatementPlaceholder and ForOfStatementPlaceholder status
  changes from FailClosed to Resolved
- Tests: fail_closed_site_count drops from 4 to 2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
